BLD A:

Asset Type: Fire Detection System: Fire Indicator Panel (FIP)
Property Name: 17-19 Distribution Dr. Orchard Hills
Description:
BLD A:
Manual mech controls are incorrectly set up. There is 1 master switch that activates SCF-1 and every other fan, and 2 other SCF switches that do not individually operate due to there being a master switch.

SCF-1 needs to be separated from the master switch and the program needs to be changed so that the 3 SCF’s can be switched on manually and individually with their switches.

BLD B:
Manual mech controls are incorrectly set up. There is 1 master switch that activates SCF-1 and the other fan, and 1 other SCF switch that does not individually operate due to there being a master switch.

SCF-1 needs to be separated from the master switch and the program needs to be changed so that the 2 SCF’s can be switched on manually and individually with their switches.
